\tzpentry{ID4284}{Coupling Constant Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4284 introduces Coupling Constant Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$t = \alpha \log\left(\frac{u}{1-u}\right), \quad r = e^t$
\]
